name: Tofu Sesame Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Toasted sesame tahini (sesame seed paste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Add 1 tablespoon of water to the mixture.
3. Puree until smooth.
4. Serve immediately, or store in the refrigerator for several days.
5. Use about 1 tablespoon over each side-dish vegetable serving.
6. Good over steamed broccoli and cooked bulgur wheat.
7. Makes 16 servings (about 1 cup each).
8. Per serving: 11 calories, 1 gram fat.
